text: @zacqonos  sorry if what I'm saying is bothering you. And I mean no trolling or disrespect when I say just look it up. But for decades, I refused to listen to anyone who went against the idea that Nasa wasn't legit. Fought with ppl. Called them names, but in this oversaturation of information, something kept gnawing at me, when I would read a comment about it all being bullshit. I can recommend videos and links but are you really going to look into it? I know Ididn't. Like I said it took decades to deprogram me from the brainwashing. Thats why I say show me the facts. Show me pictures of actual space, not illustrations that took millions of dollars to make. And I'm not that smart, I'm not that stupid either, but I know what a lie is. And when they come right out and say it's an illustration and leave out the part that it's not an actual picture of something, that is misleading.
